zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig於大約1290年出生在威爾士福林爾。她於大約1311年與Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan在威爾士福林爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1350年在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在威爾士福林爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig于大约1290年出生在威尔士福林爾。她于大约1311年与Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan在威尔士福林爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1350年在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在威尔士福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig was born about 1290, in Flintshire, Wales. She married Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan about 1311, in Flintshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died about 1350, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig est née environ 1290, à Flintshire, Galles. Elle a épousé Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan environ 1311, à Flintshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Flintshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig wurde um 1290 in Flintshire, Wales geboren. Sie hat um 1311 in Flintshire, Wales Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1350 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Flintshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig è nata il circa 1290 nel Flintshire, Galles. Lei sposato Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan circa 1311, nel Flintshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Flintshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrigは約1290年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた。約1311年にウェールズフリントシュアイアでCynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1350年に故郷で62歳で死去し，ウェールズフリントシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig(은)는 대략 1290년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 플린츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Flintshire, Gales. Ela casou-se com Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan aproximadamente 1311, em Flintshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig родилась около 1290 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan около 1311 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 1350 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности флинцхир, Уэльс.
